Tip of the day
Equipping a gear set while at a bank will automatically withdraw all the items from the bank.

Hunting bestiary

Hunting bestiary
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Tools
Value: 30
Keyword: Skill book
Search
Keyword: 		Hunting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A grand tome of beasts, critters, and strange creatures of all kinds. Invaluable pages fill the book with illustrations, descriptions, habits, and habitats.

The Hunting bestiary item is a loot item.

Requirement

  • At least Hunting lvl. 22.

Attributes

-10% Work efficiency While doing Hunting.
+25% Fine material finding While doing Hunting.
+3% Double rewards While doing Hunting.
+10% Bonus experience While doing Hunting.

Uses

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Payment
Mysterious Merchant 10

Sources

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Hunting chest 1 0.833% 3.291% ~1 in 30

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Price
Mysterious Merchant 40
